examTip: Train problems and Boat & Stream are the most frequently asked TSD types in WB SI. Master these two sub-types and you can solve any TSD question.

sections.heading: 🔑 Core Formula
points: Speed = Distance / Time
Distance = Speed × Time
Time = Distance / Speed
Unit conversions: 1 km/hr = 5/18 m/s → multiply by 5/18
Unit conversions: 1 m/s = 18/5 km/hr → multiply by 18/5
Average Speed (equal distance) = 2xy / (x+y) — NOT (x+y)/2

sections.heading: 🚂 Train Problems — 3 Types
points: TYPE 1 — Train crossing a POLE/PERSON: Distance = Length of train only
TYPE 2 — Train crossing a PLATFORM/BRIDGE: Distance = Length of train + Length of platform
TYPE 3 — Two trains crossing each other:
→ Same direction: Relative Speed = |S1 − S2|, Distance = L1 + L2
→ Opposite direction: Relative Speed = S1 + S2, Distance = L1 + L2
Time = Distance / Relative Speed
TRAP: When a train passes a person SITTING in another train → distance = only your train's length

sections.heading: 🚣 Boat & Stream — Always Exam Tested
points: Downstream speed (U) = Speed of boat + Speed of stream
Upstream speed (V) = Speed of boat − Speed of stream
Speed of boat in still water = (U + V) / 2
Speed of stream / current = (U − V) / 2
TRICK: If downstream time = T1 and upstream time = T2 for same distance:
Boat speed : Stream speed = (T1+T2) : (T2−T1)

sections.heading: 📊 Meeting Point Problems
points: Two people A and B walk toward each other from distance D apart:
→ They meet when combined distance = D
→ Time to meet = D / (Sa + Sb)
A and B start from same point in opposite directions on a circular track:
→ They meet every D/(Sa+Sb) time units
A and B in same direction, A faster:
→ A laps B when A gains one full lap → Time = Lap distance / (Sa − Sb)

sections.heading: ⚡ Average Speed Trap
points: Journey at X km/hr for first half, Y km/hr for second half:
Average = 2XY/(X+Y) — NOT (X+Y)/2
Example: 40 km/hr first half, 60 km/hr second half:
REMEMBER: When distances are equal, use harmonic mean (2XY/(X+Y))
When times are equal, simple average = (X+Y)/2 is correct

items.question: A 200m train crosses a 300m platform in 25 seconds. Find speed in km/hr.
Boat speed in still water = 12 km/hr. Stream speed = 4 km/hr. Time to go 48 km downstream?
Two trains 180m and 120m travel at 48 km/hr and 42 km/hr toward each other. Time to cross?
items.solution: Relative speed = 48+42 = 90 km/hr = 25 m/s. Distance = 180+120 = 300m. Time = 300/25 = 12 sec.

items.question: A person goes at 60 km/hr and returns at 40 km/hr. Find average speed.
